title: Object-Oriented Architecture and Capstone Delivery · Python Certification Board
summary: Solve unfamiliar object-model, invariant, collaboration, inheritance, protocol, typing, lifecycle, pattern, testing, persistence, and architecture incidents. Planned artifact: Produce a cumulative evidence packet across unfamiliar cases, performance tasks, explanations, and root-cause repairs. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Reason about object identity, type, value, mutability, equality, and lifetime in an object-oriented design.
Explain function descriptors, bound methods, self, cls, and how attribute access supplies the receiver.
Establish complete valid object invariants during construction or reject invalid input with meaningful errors.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.python:
"""python-oop cumulative stakeholder program."""

from pathlib import Path
from typing import Any

Preserve inputs, constraints, an observable trace, and a boundary result.
Use the documented misconception as a counterexample target: A class count and UML diagram demonstrate object-oriented mastery.
